items.headline: How I Generated **1.6 Lakh** Views & **2.5K** Subscribers in Just 5 Days!
items.strategy:
​"Is project ka main objective tha 'YouTube Recommendations' ko trigger karna. Maine 3 main factors par focus kiya:
​The Hook (52% Retention): Video ke pehle 30 seconds ko itna engage banaya ki 61% audience wahan tak ruki rahi (as seen in retention graph).
​CTR Optimization: Ek 'High-Curiosity' 3D thumbnail design kiya jisne normal se 5.5 guna zyada views generate kiye.
​Recommendation Loop: 1.2 Lakh views seedha YouTube Recommendations se aaye, jo dikhata hai ki content algorithm-friendly tha.
​Result: Sirf 5 dinon mein 1.6 Lakh+ views, 3.5K hours ka watch time, aur 2,500 se zyada organic subscribers gain kiye."
